case_title: NANCY BARSOTTI VS. SEAN HOGAN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-06-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY CORBETT, CONRAD MARK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-14-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARSOTTI, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT HOGAN, SEAN FAHEY, MICHAEL DOES 1 THROUGH 1O INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-14-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-17-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-29-2006
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT INCLUDING ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CONRAD M. CORBETT, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-06-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-21-2006. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
